verse_text: And this commandment we have from Him: that he who loves God must love his brother also.

links.context: Freed from hate, sadness, and anger, we are able to receive the greatest virtue: perfect love. The love of enemies is not merely an emotion, but includes decision and action. It is to treat and see our enemies as the closest members of our own family. (See [[1JN.4:7]]-21.)

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: Christ shows that the commandment of God cannot be superseded by man's religious traditions. Devotion to God includes both obedience to His commandments and service to others--these two cannot be separated (see also [[JAS.2:14]]-18; [[1JN.4:7]]-21).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
